# zstack_auto_scaling_group (Resource)

Manage ZStack auto scaling groups. An auto scaling group automatically adjusts the number of VM instances based on scaling rules and policies.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `default_cooldown` (Number) The default cooldown period in seconds between two scaling activities.
- `max_resource_size` (Number) The maximum number of instances in the scaling group.
- `min_resource_size` (Number) The minimum number of instances in the scaling group.
- `name` (String) The name of the auto scaling group.
- `removal_policy` (String) The policy for removing instances when scaling in (e.g., OldestInstance, NewestInstance, OldestScalingConfiguration).
- `scaling_resource_type` (String) The type of resource to scale (e.g., VmInstance).

### Optional

- `description` (String) The description of the auto scaling group.

### Read-Only

- `state` (String) The state of the auto scaling group (Enabled, Disabled).
- `uuid` (String) The UUID of the auto scaling group.
